race.comment: DREAMWRITER (6) was thereabouts last time out when third at Sunshine Coast over 1200m, beaten a head. Should be at her peak now. Has been in the money at all three starts this preparation, including a win. Should prove tough to beat. ZAVEGA (10) missed the placings two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1200m at Moree, beaten only 1.3 lengths. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. SMART 'N' STYLISH (5) looked handy winning here on debut before being tipped out for a lengthy spell. Revved up for this with a recent trial and gets a stack of weight off with the 3kg claim. Can run a race while fresh. PROPAGANDA (7) resumes here but showed enough in the first campaign to warrant consideration for a race like this. Keep very safe.
